label: LinkedIn — Professional Profile Browser
description: Extracted from: joeyism/linkedin_scraper v3 (Playwright), ManiMozaffar/linkedIn-scraper, ed-word/Linkedin-Scraper. Verified 2026-07-16: 1570px login page ('Войти или зарегистрироваться'). Requires auth for any profile/feed content.
source_patterns: Profile page: must scroll full height to trigger lazy-loaded sections
Scroll speed: slow, deliberate. 2-4s pause per section (reading)
'See more' buttons on about/experience: click → 2-3s for expand
Connection request: click Connect → 2-3s → Add note → type → 1s → Send
Search results: scroll 1-2s per result, click → 3-5s profile load
Feed: similar to Twitter but slower (professional content, longer reads)

scroll.description: Full profile scroll — sections lazy-load. Source: linkedin_scraper v3

profile_scroll_strategy.description: Must scroll to bottom to trigger all lazy sections. Do NOT jump-to-bottom — scroll incrementally.

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate profile → scroll top-to-bottom (3 passes, 2-4s pauses) → click 'See more' on sections → scroll again → click Connect/Message → type → send
